hypotheses.name: TRRUST co-regulation + GO co-annotation vs embedding proximity
hypotheses.method: Build co-regulated pairs (genes sharing a TF regulator, n=5989) and GO co-annotated pairs (10 immune gene sets, n=32). At L11: Mann-Whitney AUROC testing lower embedding distance vs random pairs (n=5000). Per-layer Spearman rho(layer, AUROC).
hypotheses.result_value: co-reg AUROC=0.506 p=0.867; GO AUROC=0.473 p=0.302; co-reg rho(layer,AUROC)=-0.993 p<0.0001; GO rho=+0.720 p=0.008
hypotheses.next_action: Co-regulation metric does not predict proximity at L11. GO co-annotation also null. Retire functional annotation → proximity hypothesis in this form. The negative GO AUROC at early layers (pairs start closer) is interesting but marginally significant.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: 2nd negative for annotation→proximity link (STRING in iter_0031, co-reg/GO now)

hypotheses.name: B-cell marker kNN precision@10 profile across layers
hypotheses.method: For each B-cell marker (n=5 in-vocab), find k=10 nearest neighbors in 195-gene embedding space. Compute mean precision@10 (fraction of neighbors that are B-cell markers). Bootstrap null: 500 random gene sets of same size. Test at L2, L5, L8, L11.
hypotheses.next_action: Strong positive: B-cell markers form a geometrically coherent cluster (7x enriched at L2) that persists to L11. Extend to cross-model Geneformer validation and test with expanded B-cell marker set.

hypotheses.name: B-cell vs non-B-cell centroid separation trajectory (normalized)
hypotheses.method: Per layer (L0-L11): compute B-cell centroid (n=5) vs non-B-cell centroid (n=190). Raw L2 distance and normalized distance (divided by mean pairwise distance from 2000 random pairs). Spearman rho(layer, distance). Bootstrap null: 1000 random size-5 sets.
hypotheses.result_value: norm_rho=+0.972 p=0.0000; raw_rho=-0.902 p=0.0001; bootstrap_null_mean_rho=-0.969 z=0.82 emp_p=0.088
hypotheses.next_action: Normalized centroid separation increases monotonically (rho=+0.972) showing B-cell geometric amplification relative to overall manifold scale. Raw separation is indistinguishable from null (bootstrap p=0.088). Use normalized metric going forward. Combine with H02 to build full B-cell geometry case.
